items.title: Why a U.K. By-Election in Makerfield Could Topple Prime Minister Keir Starmer
items.summary: Andy Burnham, the mayor of Greater Manchester, is running for a seat in Parliament. It’s a vital step in a campaign to oust his party colleague Prime Minister Keir Starmer.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: ED summons ex-Kerala CM Pinarayi Vijayan’s daughter T. Veena for questioning in CMRL pay-off case
items.summary: Besides Veena, ED asks CMRL chairman and managing director Sasidharan Kartha and senior company officials to appear before it as part of probe

items.title: Iran war day 102: Trump warns Israel against new strikes as ceasefire holds
items.summary: Iran warns fighting could restart as tensions remain high and Trump urges Israel to protect the fragile ceasefire.
